content.en:
Origin Boundary Sea.

Ye Tian is back, although he is injured, it doesn't matter, as long as he successfully brings back the Primal Spirit Spring Liquid and the Primal Dao Tree.

This time, in order to bring back these two treasures, his duplicate body was severely damaged, and the Will Blade was shattered, and if he was replaced by other Nine Realms-level controllers, he would have fallen and died a long time ago.

But Ye Tian actually didn't pay any price.

After coming back, Ye Tian sent the Primal Spirit Spring Liquid and the Primordial Dao Tree back to the Void Area, and then dissolved this replica body and recondensed a replica body, which was faster than slowly healing.

......

"Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid, eighty-one thousand one hundred and thirty-three drops!"

Ye Tian checked these primordial spiritual spring liquids, confirmed them for several miles, and was immediately extremely excited.

Before, he entered the Primal Spiritual Mountain, and he was lucky enough to snatch nine drops of the Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid, and compared to the Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid here, it was simply not worth mentioning.

Of course.

Compared to the number of miles of the Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid that the Primal Ancestor had obtained at the beginning, it was definitely not worth mentioning.

However, for Ye Tian, so much Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid was completely enough, there was no need to look for Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid, he could always absorb the origin of the Origin Realm Sea, and there was no need to worry about the problem of Origin Assimilation.

In addition, he also obtained a Primal Dao fruit tree.

The Primordial Dao Fruit Tree, also known as the Primordial Dao Tree, is incomparably valuable in itself, and the Primordial Dao Tree itself can help people assist in the changes of the Enlightenment Dao, and the Primordial Dao Fruit born on it can forcibly break through to the will of the Transformation Realm.

The Primordial Dao Fruit is also one of the very few supreme treasures that can allow the will of the Eternal Controller to directly step into the Will of the Transformation Realm, which is extremely rare.

The reason why it was named Taichu Dao Fruit is also because it was discovered by the Taichu Ancestor, so it was named by the Taichu Ancestor.

In fact, many of the treasures have been named after great beings, which is one of their bad tastes.

"It takes endless years for the Primordial Dao Fruit to be born, but there is already a Primordial Dao Fruit on this Primordial Dao Tree, which can be kept for the future use of Yue'er. This primordial Dao tree is very precious, and it cannot be known to anyone in the human race for the time being, nor can it be known to anyone from the outside world. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian planted the Primal Dao Tree, but blocked it.

In the following days, Ye Tian continued to practice with the Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid, not worrying about the problem of origin assimilation at all, and the speed of his strength improvement was very fast.

And he also refined the two statues of the Border Fire Controller one by one.

At this point, the number of his statues of ten thousand faces has reached seven, and he is very close to gathering nine.

......

Xuantian Sect.

The Xuantu Controller looked at the three Eternal Masters in front of him and trembled.

These three are the Crowe Controller, the Wind Heng Controller, and the White Shark Controller.

These are three Nine Realm-level masters, far surpassing the Xuantu masters.

"Three seniors, this matter really has nothing to do with me!" The master of Xuantu said helplessly: "The controller of the border fire is my friend, who once helped me, he said this time that he was trapped and wanted to ask for help, I just helped out, I really don't know anything!"

"The Border Fire Controller has pitted us, and this time I don't know what caused it, which triggered the Wasteland Forbidden Life Riot within the wasteland, and almost fell, do you think that in a word, we will let you go?"

Feng Heng's controller said coldly.

But at this moment, time and space rippled, and a figure walked out, and it was Ye Tian.

"Infinite Master!"

"Infinite Master!"

"Infinite Master!"

The three Nine Realm-level masters said very politely.

"Three, give me a face, this matter must have nothing to do with the master of the Xuantu, if it really has a relationship, what is he still doing here?" Ye Tian said.

The three Nine Realms level controllers are not stupid, and they also know that they have little to do with the Xuantu controllers, but they have suffered a big loss and have been teased, so they naturally vent their anger.

And the Master of the Xuantu is a suitable target.

However, now that Ye Tian has come forward for the master of Xuantu, the three of them thought about it carefully and forgot it.

"Then we'll give the Endless Controller face, and forget about this matter!"

Feng Heng is in control.

Soon, the three of them were all nine realm-level controllers who left.

"Thank you, Infinite Master!" thanked the Xuantu Master.

He originally tried it, so he asked Ye Tian for help, but he didn't expect Ye Tian to really come.

"Xuantu master, I'll only help you this once, don't bother me anymore for this kind of thing in the future!" Ye Tian said.

If it weren't for the great benefits he had gained this time, he wouldn't have helped Ye Tian, after all, the master of the Xuantu could be regarded as indirectly trapping him.

"Yes!"

The master of the Xuantu nodded repeatedly.

......

Void Zone.

Ye Tian was cultivating here, and the other copy body still went to Taichu Mountain, so that it would not arouse the suspicion of others.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian continued to absorb the Endless Origin, and with the help of the Primal Spirit Spring Liquid, his assimilation level increased very slowly, but his strength increased very quickly.

Before you know it, a billion years have passed.

And during this period of time, the Origin Realm Sea was very calm, and nothing seemed to have happened.

this day.

Ye Tian ended his long years of penance.

"Six points for the degree of origin assimilation!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Even the degree of assimilation that was less than one percent had no effect at all, but his strength had reached the extreme level of the Nine Realms under the endless origin refining.

And so this day.

Ye Tian came to the sixth layer of the Taichu Tower, and he wanted to try the difficulty of this layer.

At this level, he is not ready to use the seven statues of ten thousand phases, nor is he ready to use the will blade, just relying on his own strength to break through this layer.

The sixth floor of the Taichu Tower.

After Ye Tian entered here, he met an opponent condensed by the Primal Tower.

Rumble!!!

The battle broke out, Ye Tian and the other party continued to fight, whether it was speed and strength, they completely surpassed the other party, and a casual blow was comparable to the top origin control technique.

Crush!

Crush!

Crush!

Ye Tian crushed the opponent with all his moves, and not long after, he shattered the opponent's primordial golden light with a single blow of the space-time splitting blade, and then completely seriously injured him.

Not long after, the opponent of this layer was defeated by Ye Tian and broke through the sixth layer.

This also means that Ye Tian's true strength has reached the level of the sixth layer of the Taichu Tower, and if you add the seven Ten Thousand Phases Statues and the Will Blade Sword, as well as his own physical advantage, he is almost invincible among the Nine Realm-level controllers.
